title: 24:40 ГўВҖВ” October 17, 2024
body_text:
24:40 ГўВҖВ” October 17, 2024
Update to the Wires Part and Wires Forms
We updated the Wires Part to reflect an enhancement to template management in the Wires application. Going forward, templates that are deleted from the list of available templates are assigned a ГўВҖВңPending DeletionГўВҖВқ status. Authorized users can restore templates that are pending deletion, or permanently delete them from the Wires application. MTS Administrators must assign the new ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplatesГўВҖВқ permission to the appropriate Wires Users to manage templates pending deletion.
We also updated the Wires Part and related forms to reflect changes to the source of funds question in Wires.
Electronic Payments Volume
Wires Part
Section 4.2, Description of Wires Customizable Elements
We updated the Collect Funding Method content to reflect changes to the source of funds question in Wires.
Section 5.2, Setting up a Centralized Wires Environment
We added a description of the new ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplatesГўВҖВқ Outbox permission.
Section 5.3, Setting up a Partially Centralized Wires Environment
We added a description of the new ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplatesГўВҖВқ Outbox permission.
Section 5.4, Setting up a Decentralized Wires Environment
We added a description of the new ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplatesГўВҖВқ Outbox permission.
Section 8.8, Creating a Wires User in MTS
We added a description of the new ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplatesГўВҖВқ Outbox permission. We also updated the MTS User profile figures.
Section 8.9, Modifying a Wires User in MTS
We updated the MTS User profile figure.
Section 8.10, Deleting a Wires User in MTS
We updated the MTS User profile figure.
Section 8.11, Authorizing Changes to Wires UsersГўВҖВҷ Profiles in MTS
We updated the MTS User profile figure.
Section 15.4, Completing the Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171
We updated the Wire Funds section of the form instructions to reflect changes to the source of funds question in Wires.
Section 16.10, Completing the Regulatory Section
We updated the procedures to reflect changes to the source of funds question in Wires.
Chapter 18, Managing Wire Templates
We restructured the Chapter and added content on restoring and permanently deleting wire Templates.
Section 27.3, Creating Outgoing Wires in a Contingency Situation
We updated the Wire Funds section of the instructions for completing Contingency Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1799, to reflect changes to the source of funds question in Wires.
Section 29.5, Creating an MDB / Forge Commercial Business Customer User ID in MTS
We updated the MTS User Profile figure and noted that the ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplateГўВҖВқ Outbox permission doesnГўВҖВҷt apply to MDB/Forge Commercial profiles.
